seniority.level: Senior / Staff IC or People Manager
level_signals: 8+ years of experience in operations, strategy, and consulting
at least 5 years of experience building and leading customer-facing operations
direct experience engaging with executives and senior leaders
operating at all altitudes – discussing strategy and vision with executives

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 8+ years of experience in operations, strategy, and consulting, with at least 5 years of experience building and leading customer-facing operations. You have a history of high impact work in a technical environment.
with at least 5 years of experience building and leading customer-facing operations
Have extensive experience in taking end-to-end ownership of large, ambiguous problems, and breaking them down into clear, actionable plans.
Have direct experience engaging with executives and senior leaders to influence and drive strategic decisions.
Are highly analytical, with strong skills in data modeling and operational forecasting to drive insights and decision-making.
Possess excellent communication and collaboration skills and are skilled in influencing stakeholders across all levels of the organization.
Are comfortable operating at all altitudes – discussing strategy and vision with executives, and troubleshooting operations with individual contributors.
Thrive in chaos, and relentlessly drive program structure to enable the team.
Have a passion for technology, AI, and customer service, and are enthusiastic about the transformative impact of AI on business and society.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Are non-traditional – this role will require leveraging technology and concepts that are not yet established in the world (some of which you will produce yourself).

scope.surface: User Operations / Customer Support organization at OpenAI
scope.business_model: B2B and B2C AI products; customers range from early-stage startups to global enterprises
primary_metrics_inferred: Support organization growth in line with business growth
core_responsibilities: Drive the ideation and operationalization of new support systems, processes, and programs
Collaborate with leaders to identify, evaluate, and prioritize new strategic and operational initiatives
Work with product, engineering, and data teams to uncover and address key operational challenges and growth/scaling opportunities
Deep dive into critical drivers of support operations and identify opportunities for optimization and innovation
Partner with go-to-market, product, and partnerships to launch new initiatives including change management

green_flags: Clear articulation of scope and organizational context (User Operations team at OpenAI)
Role explicitly tied to AI-driven transformation of customer support — high-impact growth area
Cross-functional exposure across Product, Engineering, Sales, and GTM
JD explicitly states 'this is not creating and executing playbooks' — signals genuine strategic ownership
red_flags: No location or remote policy stated — significant unknown for candidates
8+ years AND 5+ years sub-requirement is a high bar with no flexibility language
Role scope is extremely broad and ambiguous ('drive ideation', 'think ten steps ahead') — success criteria unclear
